title: Zybit
blurb: Voice AI that writes a dentist's spoken findings straight into Open Dental, on the right tooth and in their own codes.

title: RWA Analyzer
blurb: Verifies whether a tokenized real-world asset is actually backed, instead of rubber-stamping it. Runs over MCP, CLI, and HTTP.

title: Kite Credit
blurb: A cross-border credit score built from on-chain Solana activity, GitHub history, and ZK-verified bank statements.

title: CommitMint
blurb: Stake on your goals and let Anchor smart contracts verify your progress on Solana.

title: ComputeSwarm
blurb: A marketplace that rents out idle GPUs with trustless USDC micropayments on Base.

title: GraphRAG Dodd-Frank
blurb: Answers questions across the 800-page Dodd-Frank Act using a knowledge graph instead of a flat vector store.

title: Texas Hold'em
blurb: Networked multiplayer poker written from scratch in OCaml, with a TCP server and terminal clients.
